title: PepePrikol Remastered
description: Is a frog themed resource pack
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9390267a2cc21e0d542709378cbc1d516247fe30_0.webp)
# ABOUT
**PEPE PRIKOL** is a frog themed resource pack remaster starting from version 2.0.
Made for players who want a fun and clean interface.
It changes the HUD and UI without touching blocks or items.

# FEATURES:
- Frog style.
- Reworked hearts, armor and air bubbles.
- Pepe frog styled icons for Simple Voice Chat.
- Full frog themed translation of Simple Voice Chat for RU, EN and ES.
- Clean and consistent style.
- A full frog themed interface is planned for future updates.
